# BdMSO — Bangladesh Mathematics and Science Olympiad

> BdMSO is the official qualifying platform that selects primary-school students (Grade 6 and under) from Bangladesh to represent the country at the International Mathematics and Science Olympiad (IMSO). It is organised by BdOSN and SPSB.

## Key pages

- [About](https://bdmso.org/about): What BdMSO is, its mission, and the organising bodies.
- [Programs](https://bdmso.org/programs): The National Olympiad plus camps, courses, and workshops.
- [Registration](https://bdmso.org/registration): How primary students enter the National Round.
- [Results](https://bdmso.org/results): Gold/silver/bronze medalists by year and subject.
- [Team](https://bdmso.org/team): Organisers, mentors, advisors, and the IMSO delegation.
- [Resources](https://bdmso.org/resources): Syllabus, regulations, and question patterns.

## Updates

- [Blog](https://bdmso.org/blog): News, announcements, and workshop write-ups (feed: https://bdmso.org/rss.xml).
- [Media](https://bdmso.org/media): Press coverage of BdMSO.

## Eligibility

Open to students 13 or younger (born after 1 October 2013) enrolled in Grade 6 or lower as of 1 October 2026.
